instructions.summary: Connect your LinkedIn account to Zernio so the agent can post autonomously to your professional network — highest quality audience for VerdeDesk.
instructions.why: LinkedIn is where D8 visa holders and digital nomads in Portugal are most professionally active. No karma gate, no moderation. A single agent post can reach hundreds of relevant people. Once connected, the agent handles all LinkedIn posting permanently.
instructions.exact_action:
1. Go to https://app.zernio.com
2. Log in with your Zernio account
3. Go to Accounts → Add Account → LinkedIn
4. Authorise via LinkedIn OAuth (it will ask for posting permissions)
5. Once connected, copy the account ID from the accounts list
6. Reply to the agent with: 'LinkedIn connected, account ID: [id]'

The agent will store the ID in founder-research.json and start posting immediately.
instructions.unblocks: Autonomous LinkedIn distribution — agent posts to your professional network without any manual action

result: Cancelled — Carlos's LinkedIn is his professional account (day job), not available for VerdeDesk. Do not create LinkedIn queue items for this project.
